_rotation_note: display.rotate intentionally unset: rotation is unit-dependent on this panel, so it stays a user setting (/display/rotate).

calibration._comment: Known-good matrix from #123; seeded into settings.json at install so the first-run wizard is skipped (wizard math is bad on this panel).

printer._hardware_comment: Confirmed stock Klipper object names (#986); standard names match HelixScreen defaults, so preset-mode hardware-mapping skip is safe.

default_macros._comment: Stock has no public LOAD_FILAMENT; _LOAD_FILAMENT/_UNLOAD_FILAMENT are self-contained and safe to call directly (#986).
